---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the problem or gap this feature would address. "I want X" is less useful than "When I do Y, I can't Z." -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would you like to see? Be as specific as you can. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Did you consider other ways to solve this? Why did you rule them out? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Links, mockups, prior art, anything relevant. -->

---

**Note:** yeet is intentionally minimal. Features that add UI complexity, new dependencies, or user-tracking are unlikely to be accepted. Features that improve security, reliability, or operational visibility are most welcome.
